mermaidSyntax:
graph TD subgraph GEN["🧬 Genomics Pipeline"] G1[WGS Sequencing] --> G2[Variant Calling] G2 --> G3[SNP/Indel Annotation] end subgraph TRA["🔬 Transcriptomics Pipeline"] T1[RNA-seq] --> T2[Differential Expression] T2 --> T3[Pathway Enrichment] end subgraph PRO["💊 Proteomics Pipeline"] P1[Mass Spectrometry] --> P2[Protein Quantification] P2 --> P3[PTM Analysis] end G3 -.->|Variants inform DE| T2 P3 -.->|PTMs validate| T3 subgraph HUB["🔗 Integration Hub"] G3 --> I{Multi-omics
Integration} T3 --> I P3 --> I I --> M1[MOFA] I --> M2[Network Analysis] I --> M3[Causal Inference] end subgraph BIO["🎯 Biomarker Discovery"] M1 --> B1[Candidate Selection] B1 --> B2[Validation Cohort] B2 --> B3[Clinical Utility] end subgraph MEC["⚙️ Mechanism Insight"] M2 --> M4[Pathway Modeling] M4 --> M5[Drug Target ID] end subgraph PUB["📄 Publication"] M3 --> P4[Manuscript] P4 --> P5[Peer Review] P5 --> P6[Journal] end B3 -.->|Targeted Validation| G1 B3 -.->|Targeted Validation| T1 B3 -.->|Targeted Validation| P1 style I fill:#6366f1,stroke:#4338ca,color:#fff style G3 fill:#10b981,stroke:#047857,color:#fff style T3 fill:#f59e0b,stroke:#d97706,color:#fff style P3 fill:#ef4444,stroke:#b91c1c,color:#fff style B3 fill:#8b5cf6,stroke:#6d28d9,color:#fff
